summary: TeeEvidencePolicy the E1 device ships for the cloud-routed-inference topology: the on-device agent runs in the E1 CoVE TVM, but private inference is routed to a remote dstack CVM behind a confidential H100 GPU. Per assertNpuPrivateInferenceAllowed('cloud') in packages/agent/src/services/tee-confidential-inference.ts, the GPU equivalent is gated: claims.gpuProtected + a measurements.gpuFirmware golden digest, and the remote KMS provider (dstack/tdx) is added to allowedProviders. rejectSimulatedEvidence is true: a cloud verifier must refuse self-declared dev/mock evidence (dstack #608 defense). Consumed by evaluateTeeEvidencePolicy (tee-policy.ts).
